heading: Short title
label: 791a Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Federal Power Act”.
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of part III of the Federal Power Act, and not as part of part I of that Act which comprises this subchapter.

Short Title of 2013 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 113–23, § 1(a)127 Stat. 493Aug. 9, 2013“This Act [amending sections 798, 823a, and 2705 of this title and enacting provisions set out as notes preceding section 791 and under ] may be cited as the ‘Hydropower Regulatory Efficiency Act of 2013’.”section 797 of this title

Short Title of 1990 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–575, § 1104 Stat. 2834Nov. 15, 1990“This Act [enacting , The Public Health and Welfare, amending sections 796 and 824a–3 of this title and sections 2014, 2061, 2201, and 2284 of Title 42, and enacting provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Solar, Wind, Waste, and Geothermal Power Production Incentives Act of 1990’.”section 2243 of Title 42section 796 of this title

Short Title of 1988 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–473, § 1102 Stat. 2299Oct. 6, 1988“This Act [amending and enacting provisions set out as notes under ] may be cited as the ‘Regulatory Fairness Act’.”section 824e of this titlesection 824e of this title

Short Title of 1986 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–495, § 1(a)100 Stat. 1243Oct. 16, 1986“This Act [enacting sections 797b and 823b of this title, amending sections 797, 800, 802, 803, 807, 808, 817, 823a, 824a–3, and 824j of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 797, 803, 823a, 824a–3, and 825h of this title] may be cited as the ‘Electric Consumers Protection Act of 1986’.”
